scripts.kill:3001: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $procIds = $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in $procIds) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output ('Killed PID(s): ' + ($procIds -join ', ')) } else { Write-Output 'No listener on port 3001' }"
scripts.kill:backend-watch: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'node\s+--watch\s+src/index\.js' }; if ($procs) { $ids = $procs | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId; foreach ($id in $ids) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output ('Killed backend watcher PID(s): ' + ($ids -join ', ')) } else { Write-Output 'No backend watcher process found' }"
scripts.restart: npm run kill:backend-watch && npm run kill:3001 && npm run dev
